isi.lyrics:
Lyric TRADE L & SEIN - ROLLING LOUD

Romanization

I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city

B**ch, who you?
My discography goes hard
eotteoge baetneunji moreumyeon gyang nose job
I fell in love with these b**ches
na eoril ttae jjaksaranghaetdeon yeojadeulgwa da janne
jeil saranghaetdeon neoneun daeche eodie?
simbuneul ollyeotji, eogulhaetgie
chimbuneuro ollaoryeoneun aedeureun dwie
eommaga malhae, “adeul, eonje oni jibe?”

She fell in love with my money, not me
silpaereul gyeokkeosseodo kkeutteogeopji
bakjaebeom ammogeun teullin jeok eopji
nae jeongsineun stoned
momeul nuphyeo island
matchwoboryeogo haetjiman nae biwi
sanghae, mot haemeokgetdago da biri
When I was goppiri
piryohaetji yeompiri
nae jeongsineun stoned
momeul nuphyeo island

eoneusaenggabuteo yeojachingguegeneun
allibaireul mandeureo
“dapjanghae ppalli”
jeonsegyereul doradanyeo hotel lobby
Perfect timing
geoul aneneun top of the city
I love my swag
Why you keep talking on the Internet?
All black ibeo, jangnyesikhae
na ttaemune dwijin gibuni eottae?

B**ch, who you?
My discography goes hard
eotteoge baetneunji moreumyeon gyang nose job
I fell in love with these b**ches
na eoril ttae jjaksaranghaetdeon yeojadeulgwa da janne
jeil saranghaetdeon neoneun daeche eodie?
simbuneul ollyeotji, eogulhaetgie
chimbuneuro ollaoryeoneun aedeureun dwie
eommaga malhae, “adeul, eonje oni jibe?”

B**ch, who you?
My discography goes hard
eotteoge baetneunji moreumyeon gyang nose job
I fell in love with these b**ches
na eoril ttae jjaksaranghaetdeon yeojadeulgwa da janne
jeil saranghaetdeon neoneun daeche eodie?
simbuneul ollyeotji, eogulhaetgie
chimbuneuro ollaoryeoneun aedeureun dwie
eommaga malhae, “adeul, eonje oni jibe?”

I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city

Hangeul

I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city
I’m the best in the Seoul city

B**ch, who you?
My discography goes hard
어떻게 뱉는지 모르면 걍 nose job
I fell in love with these b**ches
나 어릴 때 짝사랑했던 여자들과 다 잤네
제일 사랑했던 너는 대체 어디에?
신분을 올렸지, 억울했기에
친분으로 올라오려는 애들은 뒤에
엄마가 말해, “아들, 언제 오니 집에?”

She fell in love with my money, not me
실패를 겪었어도 끄떡없지
박재범 안목은 틀린 적 없지
내 정신은 stoned
몸을 눕혀 island
맞춰보려고 했지만 내 비위
상해, 못 해먹겠다고 다 비리
When I was 고삐리
필요했지 연필이
내 정신은 stoned
몸을 눕혀 island

어느샌가부터 여자친구에게는
알리바이를 만들어
“답장해 빨리”
전세계를 돌아다녀 hotel lobby
Perfect timing
거울 안에는 top of the city
I love my swag
Why you keep talking on the Internet?
All black 입어, 장례식해
나 때문에 뒤진 기분이 어때?

B**ch, who you?
My discography goes hard
어떻게 뱉는지 모르면 걍 nose job
I fell in love with these b**ches
